critical_config.notes: Advisory in all contexts; non-zero exit warns but does not fail the consumer (see publish-gates.lib.sh gate_composer_dryrun).
Pure-PHP unit suite (no Drupal kernel); runs on host PHP without DDEV.
11-min pole; calls run-quality-gate.sh which spawns ddev exec / npm run / phpunit children. Primary FD-leak suspect per RESEARCH H#1.
Advisory; gated by ILAS_LIVE_PROVIDER_GATE env var. Silently skips when env unset (see publish-gates.lib.sh:206).
